name: Tracking code in order notes
body:
[{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Merchandising Cloud adds tracking code to Shopify orders notes, that may look something like this:", "bold": true}, {"text": "
_{"uniq_id":"gKpWKl6VQhULXIZF","visit_id":"L7HzjOyO2BHStW2g"}_"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "We do this for a number of reasons:", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "It helps our search engine to correctly calculate and dynamically update products' popularity and as a result, produce more relevant search results for customers."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "We use this data for our analytics platform that allows you to check different metrics in "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://dashboard.findify.io/analytics/snapshot", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "Merchandising Cloud dashboard"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "We use this data for our personalization platform that allows us to produce relevant search results and suggestions based on current customer actions.
"}]}]}]}, {"type": "blockquote", "children": [{"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "📘 Remove Merchandising Cloud tracking code from Shopify order notes"}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "This tracking code can be removed but will affect the granularity of your Analytics and is hence advised to be kept. "}]}, {"type": "blockquote-line", "children": [{"text": "If you don't want Merchandising Cloud to insert tracking code into your Shopify orders you can contact us at "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@maropost.com", "target": "_blank", "children": [{"text": "support@maropost .com"}]}, {"text": " and our team will disable this feature."}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "
"}]}]
